scripts.build: cd ../frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.kill-port: powershell -Command "$pid = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if($pid) { taskkill /F /PID $pid } else { Write-Host 'Port 8000 is free' }"
scripts.restart: npm run kill-port && npm run dev
